articles.title: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse Might Make the Long Wait for a New 2D Castlevania Worth It | IGN Preview - IGN
articles.description: After playing the first three hours of Castlevania: Belmont's Curse, Dead Cells developer Evil Empire's take on the legendary series seems to be poised to live up to extraordinarily high standards set by its predecessors.

articles.title: 'Shouldn't Be Too Hard to Figure Out Who It Is': Pokémon Go Fans React in Disgust as Players Hand-Picked to Attend Exclusive Times Square Event Sell Their Prized Mewtwo for Thousands of Dollars, Breaking the Game's Rules - IGN
articles.description: Pokémon Go players are reacting in disgust after seeing fans who were hand-picked to attend the game's ultra-exclusive 10th anniversary Times Square event now selling off their unique Mewtwo on eBay for thousands of dollars — breaking the game's rules in the …

articles.title: You can already buy the unreleased Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, provided you have $13,000 - Android Central
articles.description: Samsung hasn't even unveiled the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra yet, but one company is already selling a $13,000 version wrapped in football history.

articles.title: 'Extremely Happy' — Microsoft Restores Player's 25-Year-Old Account After Deleting It Due to Hacker - IGN
articles.description: Microsoft has restored a player’s access to his 25-year-old account, which contained photos of his son and thousands of dollars worth of games.
